channel.title: Blog on Osvaldo de Sousa
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Osvaldo de Sousa

item.title: Your Starlink Dish is a Stratum 1 NTP Server — And Most People Don't Know It
item.description: Starlink quietly added a GPS-based NTP server to every dish. Here's what that means, why it matters, and how to put it to work on your home network.

item.title: From Consumer Router to Enterprise-Grade Home Network — A Complete Rebuild
item.description: How I rebuilt my home network from a flat consumer setup to a fully segmented, VLAN-based architecture with enterprise authentication, IPv6, and zero cloud dependencies.

item.title: Hello World
item.description: First post — what this blog is about and what to expect.
